description: Declarative packet registry for the sk-prompt parent hub: workflowMode + packetKind + backendKind + toolSurface + advisorRouting for the prompt-improve and prompt-models workflow packets. The advisor routes the single sk-prompt identity; the hub selects the workflow packet. Workflow-only hub (no surface axis), zero named extensions.

discriminator.workflowMode: Public hub/mode key; stable identity used by the hub router and this registry.
discriminator.packetKind: Axis discriminator: workflow for both sk-prompt packets (no surface packets — prompt-models' real consuming workflow, cli-opencode's pre-dispatch step, lives outside this hub, which fails the surface-packet contract).
discriminator.backendKind: prompt-engine for prompt-improve's DEPTH/CLEAR pipeline; profile-lookup for prompt-models' read-only per-model reference.

advisorRoutingContract.routingClass: metadata = resolved by hub membership (default for both sk-prompt modes). No lexical/alias-fold modes (avoids the advisor-projection extension + CI drift-guard).
advisorRoutingContract.command: The bound slash command for the mode; null when the mode has no dedicated command.
advisorRoutingContract.packetSkillName: The packet SKILL.md name; folder == packetSkillName for both modes.
